text:
3 things that changed my Threads game:

1. The official Meta API — not browser bots, not sketchy scripts. Just clean automation Meta supports.
2. Free tools (GitHub Actions + free AI APIs) run the whole thing. Zero monthly cost, zero subscription creep.
3. A self-improving loop: post, read analytics, write better tomorrow. It compounds. I just set it up once and walked away.

The 4th? Tokens auto-refresh. I haven't logged in since setup day.
